app.title: OpenViking
app.subtitle: Control Panel
config.saved_tip: Config saved, restart service to apply
basic.workspace_hint: After setting the workspace directory, the config will be read/saved from ov.conf in that directory
config.workspace_confirm: Changing the workspace will stop the service and create a new configuration file at the new location. The service will need to be restarted. Continue?
basic.server_host_desc: Server listen address, default 127.0.0.1. Set to 0.0.0.0 to allow remote access.
basic.server_port_desc: Server listen port, default 1933. Restart service to apply changes.
basic.root_api_key_desc: Root API key for server authentication. If set, all API requests must include this key via the Authorization header.
basic.storage_path_desc: Storage directory for knowledge base data, vector database files, etc.
basic.log_level_desc: Log output level: DEBUG for all debug info, INFO for general info, WARNING for warnings only, ERROR for errors only.
ai.dense_provider_desc: Embedding provider: volcengine, openai, jina, gemini, dashscope, etc.
ai.dense_api_key_desc: API key for the embedding provider.
ai.dense_model_desc: Embedding model name, e.g. doubao-embedding-vision-251215, text-embedding-3-small.
ai.dense_dimension_desc: Vector dimension. Varies by model: Doubao 1024, OpenAI text-embedding-3-small 1536.
ai.dense_input_desc: Input type: text (text only) or multimodal (text + images). Multimodal can embed text, images and mixed content.
ai.dense_batch_size_desc: Batch request size, default 32. Increase for higher throughput but more memory usage.
ai.embedding_max_retries_desc: Max retries for transient errors, default 3. 0 disables retry. Only applies to 429, 5xx, timeout errors.
ai.cb_failure_threshold_desc: Consecutive failures before circuit breaks, default 5. Provider calls are paused when tripped.
ai.cb_reset_timeout_desc: Base recovery wait time in seconds, default 60. After this, HALF_OPEN allows a probe request.
ai.cb_max_reset_timeout_desc: Maximum recovery wait time after exponential backoff in seconds, default 600.
ai.vlm_provider_desc: VLM provider: volcengine, openai, openai-codex, kimi, glm, etc.
ai.vlm_api_key_desc: VLM API key. Can be omitted for openai-codex when Codex OAuth is available.
ai.vlm_model_desc: VLM model name, e.g. doubao-seed-2-0-pro-260215, gpt-5.4, kimi-code.
ai.vlm_max_retries_desc: Max retries for VLM transient errors, default 3. Uses exponential backoff strategy.
ai.vlm_max_concurrent_desc: Maximum concurrent LLM calls during semantic processing, default 100.
ai.vlm_timeout_desc: Single VLM API request HTTP timeout in seconds, default 60. Increase for slow endpoints.
ai.vlm_thinking_desc: Enable thinking mode (only for certain Volcengine models), default off.
ai.vlm_stream_desc: Enable streaming mode (for OpenAI-compatible providers), default off. Must enable for providers that force SSE responses.
storage.vector_db_name_desc: Name of the vector database, default context.
storage.vector_db_backend_desc: Vector database backend: local, chroma, milvus.
storage.agfs_backend_desc: AGFS file storage backend: local (local filesystem), s3 (object storage).
advanced.top_k_desc: Number of most similar results to return, default 10. Higher values recall more but may include noise.
advanced.similarity_threshold_desc: Only return results with similarity above this threshold. Range 0~1, default 0.5.
advanced.cors_origins_desc: CORS allowed origin domains, comma-separated. Default * allows all origins.
advanced.observability_desc: Enable observability metrics collection for monitoring service health.
feishu.tab_hint: Feishu/Lark cloud document parsing configuration. Configure to import resources from Feishu document URLs.
feishu.app_id_desc: Feishu app ID. Can also be set via FEISHU_APP_ID environment variable.
feishu.app_secret_desc: Feishu app secret. Can also be set via FEISHU_APP_SECRET environment variable.
feishu.domain_desc: Feishu API domain. CN: https://open.feishu.cn, Lark Intl: https://open.larksuite.com.
feishu.max_rows_per_sheet_desc: Max rows to import per spreadsheet sheet, default 1000.
feishu.max_records_per_table_desc: Max records to import per base table, default 1000.
